    Enum: EnumEDAMDataTypes

    Data types from the EDAM ontology.

    URI: cam:EnumEDAMDataTypes

    Enumeration Source

    Reachable From: - Source: NONE - Nodes: edam:data_0006 - Via: rdfs:subClassOf

    edam:data_2970 None A report on protein properties concerning hydropathy Title: Protein hydropathy data
    edam:data_2976 None One or more protein sequences, possibly with associated annotation Title: Protein sequence
    edam:data_2977 None One or more nucleic acid sequences, possibly with associated annotation Title: Nucleic acid sequence
    edam:data_2978 None Data concerning a biochemical reaction, typically data and more general annot... Title: Reaction data
    edam:data_2979 None Data concerning small peptides Title: Peptide property
    edam:data_2984 None An informative report concerning or derived from the analysis of a biological... Title: Pathway or network report
    edam:data_2985 None A thermodynamic or kinetic property of a nucleic acid molecule Title: Nucleic acid thermodynamic data
    edam:data_2991 None Geometry data for a protein structure, for example bond lengths, bond angles,... Title: Protein geometry data
    edam:data_2992 None An image of protein structure Title: Protein structure image
    edam:data_2994 None Weights for sequence positions or characters in phylogenetic analysis where z... Title: Phylogenetic character weights
    edam:data_3002 None Annotation of one particular positional feature on a biomolecular (typically ... Title: Annotation track
    edam:data_3021 None Accession number of a UniProt (protein sequence) database entry Title: UniProt accession
    edam:data_3022 None Identifier of a genetic code in the NCBI list of genetic codes Title: NCBI genetic code ID
    edam:data_3025 None Identifier of a concept in an ontology of biological or bioinformatics concep... Title: Ontology concept identifier
    edam:data_3028 None Data concerning the classification, identification and naming of organisms Title: Taxonomy
    edam:data_3029 None EMBL/GENBANK/DDBJ coding feature protein identifier, issued by International ... Title: Protein ID (EMBL/GenBank/DDBJ)
    edam:data_3034 None Name or other identifier of molecular sequence feature(s) Title: Sequence feature identifier
    edam:data_3035 None An identifier of a molecular tertiary structure, typically an entry from a st... Title: Structure identifier
    edam:data_3036 None An identifier of an array of numerical values, such as a comparison matrix Title: Matrix identifier
    edam:data_3103 None Unique identifier of a drug conforming to the Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical... Title: ATC code
    edam:data_3104 None A unique, unambiguous, alphanumeric identifier of a chemical substance as cat... Title: UNII
    edam:data_3106 None Metadata concerning the software, hardware or other aspects of a computer sys... Title: System metadata
    edam:data_3108 None Raw data such as measurements or other results from laboratory experiments, a... Title: Experimental measurement
    edam:data_3110 None Raw data (typically MIAME-compliant) for hybridisations from a microarray exp... Title: Raw microarray data
    edam:data_3111 None Data generated from processing and analysis of probe set data from a microarr... Title: Processed microarray data
    edam:data_3112 None The final processed (normalised) data for a set of hybridisations in a microa... Title: Gene expression matrix
    edam:data_3113 None Annotation on a biological sample, for example experimental factors and their... Title: Sample annotation
    edam:data_3115 None Annotation on the array itself used in a microarray experiment Title: Microarray metadata
    edam:data_3117 None Data concerning the hybridisations measured during a microarray experiment Title: Microarray hybridisation data
    edam:data_3128 None A human-readable collection of information about regions within a nucleic aci... Title: Nucleic acid structure report
    edam:data_3134 None An informative report on features of a messenger RNA (mRNA) molecules includi... Title: Gene transcript report
    edam:data_3148 None A human-readable collection of information about a particular family of genes... Title: Gene family report
    edam:data_3153 None An image of a protein Title: Protein image
    edam:data_3181 None An informative report about a DNA sequence assembly Title: Sequence assembly report
    edam:data_3210 None An index of a genome sequence Title: Genome index
    edam:data_3236 None Information might include start and end position in a chromosome sequence, ch... Title: Cytoband position
    edam:data_3238 None Cell type ontology concept ID Title: Cell type ontology ID
    edam:data_3241 None Mathematical model of a network, that contains biochemical kinetics Title: Kinetic model
    edam:data_3264 None Identifier of a COSMIC database entry Title: COSMIC ID
    edam:data_3265 None Identifier of a HGMD database entry Title: HGMD ID
    edam:data_3266 None Unique identifier of sequence assembly Title: Sequence assembly ID
    edam:data_3270 None Unique identifier for a gene tree from the Ensembl database Title: Ensembl gene tree ID
    edam:data_3271 None A phylogenetic tree that is an estimate of the character's phylogeny Title: Gene tree
    edam:data_3272 None A phylogenetic tree that reflects phylogeny of the taxa from which the charac... Title: Species tree
    edam:data_3273 None Name or other identifier of an entry from a biosample database Title: Sample ID
    edam:data_3274 None Identifier of an object from the MGI database Title: MGI accession
    edam:data_3275 None Name of a phenotype Title: Phenotype name
    edam:data_3354 None A HMM transition matrix contains the probabilities of switching from one HMM ... Title: Transition matrix
    edam:data_3355 None A HMM emission matrix holds the probabilities of choosing the four nucleotide... Title: Emission matrix
    edam:data_3358 None An identifier of a data format Title: Format identifier
    edam:data_3424 None Raw biological or biomedical image generated by some experimental technique Title: Raw image
    edam:data_3425 None Data concerning the intrinsic physical (e Title: Carbohydrate property
    edam:data_3442 None An imaging technique that uses magnetic fields and radiowaves to form images,... Title: MRI image
    edam:data_3449 None An image from a cell migration track assay Title: Cell migration track image
    edam:data_3451 None Rate of association of a protein with another protein or some other molecule Title: Rate of association
    edam:data_3479 None Multiple gene identifiers in a specific order Title: Gene order
    edam:data_3483 None The spectrum of frequencies of electromagnetic radiation emitted from a molec... Title: Spectrum
    edam:data_3488 None Spectral information for a molecule from a nuclear magnetic resonance experim... Title: NMR spectrum
    edam:data_3492 None An informative report about a specific or conserved nucleic acid sequence pat... Title: Nucleic acid signature
    edam:data_3494 None A DNA sequence Title: DNA sequence
    edam:data_3495 None An RNA sequence Title: RNA sequence
    edam:data_3498 None Data on gene sequence variations resulting large-scale genotyping and DNA seq... Title: Sequence variations
    edam:data_3505 None A list of publications such as scientic papers or books Title: Bibliography
    edam:data_3509 None A mapping of supplied textual terms or phrases to ontology concepts (URIs) Title: Ontology mapping
    edam:data_3546 None Any data concerning a specific biological or biomedical image Title: Image metadata
    edam:data_3558 None A human-readable collection of information concerning a clinical trial Title: Clinical trial report
    edam:data_3567 None A report about a biosample Title: Reference sample report
    edam:data_3568 None Accession number of an entry from the Gene Expression Atlas Title: Gene Expression Atlas Experiment ID
    edam:data_3667 None Identifier of an entry from a database of disease Title: Disease identifier
    edam:data_3668 None The name of some disease Title: Disease name
    edam:data_3669 None Learning material is a document or another digital object that is designed fo... Title: Learning material
    edam:data_3670 None A training course available for use on the Web Title: Online course
    edam:data_3671 None Any free or plain text, typically for human consumption and in English Title: Text
    edam:data_3707 None Machine-readable biodiversity data Title: Biodiversity data
    edam:data_3716 None A human-readable collection of information concerning biosafety data Title: Biosafety report
    edam:data_3717 None A report about any kind of isolation of biological material Title: Isolation report
    edam:data_3718 None Information about the ability of an organism to cause disease in a correspond... Title: Pathogenicity report
    edam:data_3719 None Information about the biosafety classification of an organism according to co... Title: Biosafety classification
    edam:data_3720 None A report about localisation of the isolaton of biological material e Title: Geographic location
    edam:data_3721 None A report about any kind of isolation source of biological material e Title: Isolation source
    edam:data_3722 None Experimentally determined parameter of the physiology of an organism, e Title: Physiology parameter
    edam:data_3723 None Experimentally determined parameter of the morphology of an organism, e Title: Morphology parameter
    edam:data_3724 None Experimental determined parameter for the cultivation of an organism Title: Cultivation parameter
    edam:data_3732 None Data concerning a sequencing experiment, that may be specified as an input to... Title: Sequencing metadata name
    edam:data_3733 None A flow cell is used to immobilise, amplify and sequence millions of molecules... Title: Flow cell identifier
    edam:data_3734 None An identifier of a lane within a flow cell of a sequencing machine, within wh... Title: Lane identifier
    edam:data_3735 None A number corresponding to the number of an analysis performed by a sequencing... Title: Run number
    edam:data_3736 None Data concerning ecology; for example measurements and reports from the study ... Title: Ecological data
    edam:data_3737 None The mean species diversity in sites or habitats at a local scale Title: Alpha diversity data
    edam:data_3738 None The ratio between regional and local species diversity Title: Beta diversity data
    edam:data_3739 None The total species diversity in a landscape Title: Gamma diversity data
    edam:data_3743 None A plot in which community data (e Title: Ordination plot
    edam:data_3753 None A ranked list of categories (usually ontology concepts), each associated with... Title: Over-representation data
    edam:data_3754 None A ranked list of Gene Ontology concepts, each associated with a p-value, conc... Title: GO-term enrichment data
    edam:data_3756 None Score for localization of one or more post-translational modifications in pep... Title: Localisation score
    edam:data_3757 None Identifier of a protein modification catalogued in the Unimod database Title: Unimod ID
    edam:data_3759 None Identifier for mass spectrometry proteomics data in the proteomexchange Title: ProteomeXchange ID
    edam:data_3768 None Groupings of expression profiles according to a clustering algorithm Title: Clustered expression profiles
    edam:data_3769 None An identifier of a concept from the BRENDA ontology Title: BRENDA ontology concept ID
    edam:data_3779 None A text (such as a scientific article), annotated with notes, data and metadat... Title: Annotated text
    edam:data_3786 None A structured query, in form of a script, that defines a database search task Title: Query script
    edam:data_3805 None Structural 3D model (volume map) from electron microscopy Title: 3D EM Map
    edam:data_3806 None Annotation on a structural 3D EM Map from electron microscopy Title: 3D EM Mask
    edam:data_3807 None Raw DDD movie acquisition from electron microscopy Title: EM Movie
    edam:data_3808 None Raw acquisition from electron microscopy or average of an aligned DDD movie Title: EM Micrograph
    edam:data_3842 None Data coming from molecular simulations, computer "experiments" on model molec... Title: Molecular simulation data
    edam:data_3856 None Identifier of an entry from the RNA central database of annotated human miRNA... Title: RNA central ID
    edam:data_3861 None A human-readable systematic collection of patient (or population) health info... Title: Electronic health record
    edam:data_3869 None Data coming from molecular simulations, computer "experiments" on model molec... Title: Simulation
    edam:data_3870 None Dynamic information of a structure molecular system coming from a molecular s... Title: Trajectory data
    edam:data_3871 None Force field parameters: charges, masses, radii, bond lengths, bond dihedrals,... Title: Forcefield parameters
    edam:data_3872 None Static information of a structure molecular system that is needed for a molec... Title: Topology data
    edam:data_3905 None Visualization of distribution of quantitative data, e Title: Histogram
    edam:data_3914 None Report of the quality control review that was made of factors involved in a p... Title: Quality control report
    edam:data_3917 None A table of unnormalized values representing summarised read counts per genomi... Title: Count matrix
    edam:data_3924 None Alignment (superimposition) of DNA tertiary (3D) structures Title: DNA structure alignment
    edam:data_3932 None A score derived from the P-value to ensure correction for multiple tests Title: Q-value
    edam:data_3949 None A profile HMM is a variant of a Hidden Markov model that is derived specifica... Title: Profile HMM
    edam:data_3952 None Identifier of a pathway from the WikiPathways pathway database Title: Pathway ID (WikiPathways)
    edam:data_3953 None A ranked list of pathways, each associated with z-score, p-value or similar, ... Title: Pathway overrepresentation data
    edam:data_4022 None Identifier of a researcher registered with the ORCID database Title: ORCID Identifier
    edam:data_4040 None Data management plan is a document describing the data management of a projec... Title: Data management plan

    Identifier and Mapping Information

    Schema Source

    • from schema: https://includedcc.org/cam-expanded-enums

    LinkML Source

    name: EnumEDAMDataTypes
description: Data types from the EDAM ontology.
from_schema: https://includedcc.org/cam-expanded-enums
rank: 1000
permissible_values:
  edam:data_0582:
    text: edam:data_0582
    description: An ontology of biological or bioinformatics concepts and relations,
      a controlled vocabulary, structured glossary etc.
    title: Ontology
  edam:data_0842:
    text: edam:data_0842
    description: A text token, number or something else which identifies an entity,
      but which may not be persistent (stable) or unique (the same identifier may
      identify multiple things).
    title: Identifier
  edam:data_0844:
    text: edam:data_0844
    description: Mass of a molecule.
    title: Molecular mass
  edam:data_0845:
    text: edam:data_0845
    description: Net charge of a molecule.
    title: Molecular charge
  edam:data_0846:
    text: edam:data_0846
    description: A specification of a chemical structure.
    title: Chemical formula
  edam:data_0847:
    text: edam:data_0847
    description: 'A QSAR quantitative descriptor (name-value pair) of chemical structure.

      QSAR descriptors have numeric values that quantify chemical information encoded
      in a symbolic representation of a molecule. They are used in quantitative structure
      activity relationship (QSAR) applications. Many subtypes of individual descriptors
      (not included in EDAM) cover various types of protein properties.'
    title: QSAR descriptor
  edam:data_0849:
    text: edam:data_0849
    description: A molecular sequence and associated metadata.
    title: Sequence record
  edam:data_0850:
    text: edam:data_0850
    description: 'A collection of one or typically multiple molecular sequences (which
      can include derived data or metadata) that do not (typically) correspond to
      molecular sequence database records or entries and which (typically) are derived
      from some analytical method.

      An example is an alignment reference; one or a set of reference molecular sequences,
      structures, or profiles used for alignment of genomic, transcriptomic, or proteomic
      experimental data.

      This concept may be used for arbitrary sequence sets and associated data arising
      from processing.'
    title: Sequence set
  edam:data_0856:
    text: edam:data_0856
    description: 'How the annotation of a sequence feature (for example in EMBL or
      Swiss-Prot) was derived.

      This might be the name and version of a software tool, the name of a database,
      or ''curated'' to indicate a manual annotation (made by a human).'
    title: Sequence feature source
  edam:data_0857:
    text: edam:data_0857
    description: 'A report of sequence hits and associated data from searching a database
      of sequences (for example a BLAST search). This will typically include a list
      of scores (often with statistical evaluation) and a set of alignments for the
      hits.

      The score list includes the alignment score, percentage of the query sequence
      matched, length of the database sequence entry in this alignment, identifier
      of the database sequence entry, excerpt of the database sequence entry description
      etc.'
    title: Sequence search results
  edam:data_0858:
    text: edam:data_0858
    description: 'A "profile-profile alignment" is an alignment of two sequence profiles,
      each profile typically representing a sequence alignment.

      A "sequence-profile alignment" is an alignment of one or more molecular sequence(s)
      to one or more sequence profile(s) (each profile typically representing a sequence
      alignment).

      Report on the location of matches ("hits") between sequences, sequence profiles,
      motifs (conserved or functional patterns) and other types of sequence signatures.

      This includes reports of hits from a search of a protein secondary or domain
      database. Data associated with the search or alignment might also be included,
      e.g. ranked list of best-scoring sequences, a graphical representation of scores
      etc.'
    title: Sequence signature matches
  edam:data_0860:
    text: edam:data_0860
    description: 'Sequence signature data concerns specific or conserved pattern in
      molecular sequences and the classifiers used for their identification, including
      sequence motifs, profiles or other diagnostic element.

      This can include metadata about a motif or sequence profile such as its name,
      length, technical details about the profile construction, and so on.'
    title: Sequence signature data
  edam:data_0862:
    text: edam:data_0862
    description: A dotplot of sequence similarities identified from word-matching
      or character comparison.
    title: Dotplot
  edam:data_0863:
    text: edam:data_0863
    description: Alignment of multiple molecular sequences.
    title: Sequence alignment
  edam:data_0865:
    text: edam:data_0865
    description: A value representing molecular sequence similarity.
    title: Sequence similarity score
  edam:data_0867:
    text: edam:data_0867
    description: 'An informative report of molecular sequence alignment-derived data
      or metadata.

      Use this for any computer-generated reports on sequence alignments, and for
      general information (metadata) on a sequence alignment, such as a description,
      sequence identifiers and alignment score.'
    title: Sequence alignment report
  edam:data_0870:
    text: edam:data_0870
    description: 'A matrix of estimated evolutionary distance between molecular sequences,
      such as is suitable for phylogenetic tree calculation.

      Methods might perform character compatibility analysis or identify patterns
      of similarity in an alignment or data matrix.'
    title: Sequence distance matrix
  edam:data_0871:
    text: edam:data_0871
    description: 'As defined, this concept would also include molecular sequences,
      microsatellites, polymorphisms (RAPDs, RFLPs, or AFLPs), restriction sites and
      fragments

      Basic character data from which a phylogenetic tree may be generated.'
    title: Phylogenetic character data
  edam:data_0872:
    text: edam:data_0872
    description: 'A phylogenetic tree is usually constructed from a set of sequences
      from which an alignment (or data matrix) is calculated. See also ''Phylogenetic
      tree image''.

      The raw data (not just an image) from which a phylogenetic tree is directly
      generated or plotted, such as topology, lengths (in time or in expected amounts
      of variance) and a confidence interval for each length.'
    title: Phylogenetic tree
  edam:data_0874:
    text: edam:data_0874
    description: 'Matrix of integer or floating point numbers for amino acid or nucleotide
      sequence comparison.

      The comparison matrix might include matrix name, optional comment, height and
      width (or size) of matrix, an index row/column (of characters) and data rows/columns
      (of integers or floats).'
    title: Comparison matrix
  edam:data_0878:
    text: edam:data_0878
    description: Alignment of the (1D representations of) secondary structure of two
      or more proteins.
    title: Protein secondary structure alignment
  edam:data_0880:
    text: edam:data_0880
    description: 'An informative report of secondary structure (predicted or real)
      of an RNA molecule.

      This includes thermodynamically stable or evolutionarily conserved structures
      such as knots, pseudoknots etc.'
    title: RNA secondary structure
  edam:data_0881:
    text: edam:data_0881
    description: Alignment of the (1D representations of) secondary structure of two
      or more RNA molecules.
    title: RNA secondary structure alignment
  edam:data_0883:
    text: edam:data_0883
    description: '3D coordinate and associated data for a macromolecular tertiary
      (3D) structure or part of a structure.

      The coordinate data may be predicted or real.'
    title: Structure
  edam:data_0886:
    text: edam:data_0886
    description: 'A tertiary structure alignment will include the untransformed coordinates
      of one macromolecule, followed by the second (or subsequent) structure(s) with
      all the coordinates transformed (by rotation / translation) to give a superposition.

      Alignment (superimposition) of molecular tertiary (3D) structures.'
    title: Structure alignment
  edam:data_0887:
    text: edam:data_0887
    description: 'An informative report of molecular tertiary structure alignment-derived
      data.

      This is a broad data type and is used a placeholder for other, more specific
      types.'
    title: Structure alignment report
  edam:data_0888:
    text: edam:data_0888
    description: A value representing molecular structure similarity, measured from
      structure alignment or some other type of structure comparison.
    title: Structure similarity score
  edam:data_0889:
    text: edam:data_0889
    description: Some type of structural (3D) profile or template (representing a
      structure or structure alignment).
    title: Structural profile
  edam:data_0890:
    text: edam:data_0890
    description: A 3D profile-3D profile alignment (each profile representing structures
      or a structure alignment).
    title: Structural (3D) profile alignment
  edam:data_0892:
    text: edam:data_0892
    description: Matrix of values used for scoring sequence-structure compatibility.
    title: Protein sequence-structure scoring matrix
  edam:data_0893:
    text: edam:data_0893
    description: An alignment of molecular sequence to structure (from threading sequence(s)
      through 3D structure or representation of structure(s)).
    title: Sequence-structure alignment
  edam:data_0896:
    text: edam:data_0896
    description: An informative human-readable report about one or more specific protein
      molecules or protein structural domains, derived from analysis of primary (sequence
      or structural) data.
    title: Protein report
  edam:data_0897:
    text: edam:data_0897
    description: 'A report of primarily non-positional data describing intrinsic physical,
      chemical or other properties of a protein molecule or model.

      This is a broad data type and is used a placeholder for other, more specific
      types. Data may be based on analysis of nucleic acid sequence or structural
      data, for example reports on the surface properties (shape, hydropathy, electrostatic
      patches etc) of a protein structure, protein flexibility or motion, and protein
      architecture (spatial arrangement of secondary structure).'
    title: Protein property
  edam:data_0905:
    text: edam:data_0905
    description: 'Protein-protein interaction data from for example yeast two-hybrid
      analysis, protein microarrays, immunoaffinity chromatography followed by mass
      spectrometry, phage display etc.

      This is a broad data type and is used a placeholder for other, more specific
      types. It is primarily intended to help navigation of EDAM and would not typically
      be used for annotation.'
    title: Protein interaction raw data
  edam:data_0906:
    text: edam:data_0906
    description: Data concerning the interactions (predicted or known) within or between
      a protein, structural domain or part of a protein. This includes intra- and
      inter-residue contacts and distances, as well as interactions with other proteins
      and non-protein entities such as nucleic acid, metal atoms, water, ions etc.
    title: Protein interaction data
  edam:data_0907:
    text: edam:data_0907
    description: An informative report on a specific protein family or other classification
      or group of protein sequences or structures.
    title: Protein family report
  edam:data_0909:
    text: edam:data_0909
    description: The maximum initial velocity or rate of a reaction. It is the limiting
      velocity as substrate concentrations get very large.
    title: Vmax
  edam:data_0910:
    text: edam:data_0910
    description: Km is the concentration (usually in Molar units) of substrate that
      leads to half-maximal velocity of an enzyme-catalysed reaction.
    title: Km
  edam:data_0912:
    text: edam:data_0912
    description: 'A report of primarily non-positional data describing intrinsic physical,
      chemical or other properties of a nucleic acid molecule.

      Nucleic acid structural properties stiffness, curvature, twist/roll data or
      other conformational parameters or properties.

      This is a broad data type and is used a placeholder for other, more specific
      types.'
    title: Nucleic acid property
  edam:data_0914:
    text: edam:data_0914
    description: 'Data derived from analysis of codon usage (typically a codon usage
      table) of DNA sequences.

      This is a broad data type and is used a placeholder for other, more specific
      types.'
    title: Codon usage data
  edam:data_0916:
    text: edam:data_0916
    description: 'A report on predicted or actual gene structure, regions which make
      an RNA product and features such as promoters, coding regions, splice sites
      etc.

      This includes any report on a particular locus or gene. This might include the
      gene name, description, summary and so on. It can include details about the
      function of a gene, such as its encoded protein or a functional classification
      of the gene sequence along according to the encoded protein(s).'
    title: Gene report
  edam:data_0919:
    text: edam:data_0919
    description: 'A human-readable collection of information about a specific chromosome.

      This includes basic information. e.g. chromosome number, length, karyotype features,
      chromosome sequence etc.'
    title: Chromosome report
  edam:data_0920:
    text: edam:data_0920
    description: A human-readable collection of information about the set of genes
      (or allelic forms) present in an individual, organism or cell and associated
      with a specific physical characteristic, or a report concerning an organisms
      traits and phenotypes.
    title: Genotype/phenotype report
  edam:data_0924:
    text: edam:data_0924
    description: 'Fluorescence trace data generated by an automated DNA sequencer,
      which can be interpreted as a molecular sequence (reads), given associated sequencing
      metadata such as base-call quality scores.

      This is the raw data produced by a DNA sequencing machine.'
    title: Sequence trace
  edam:data_0925:
    text: edam:data_0925
    description: 'An assembly of fragments of a (typically genomic) DNA sequence.

      Typically, an assembly is a collection of contigs (for example ESTs and genomic
      DNA fragments) that are ordered, aligned and merged. Annotation of the assembled
      sequence might be included.'
    title: Sequence assembly
  edam:data_0926:
    text: edam:data_0926
    description: 'Radiation Hybrid (RH) scores are used in Radiation Hybrid mapping.

      Radiation hybrid scores (RH) scores for one or more markers.'
    title: RH scores
  edam:data_0927:
    text: edam:data_0927
    description: 'A human-readable collection of information about the linkage of
      alleles.

      This includes linkage disequilibrium; the non-random association of alleles
      or polymorphisms at two or more loci (not necessarily on the same chromosome).'
    title: Genetic linkage report
  edam:data_0928:
    text: edam:data_0928
    description: Data quantifying the level of expression of (typically) multiple
      genes, derived for example from microarray experiments.
    title: Gene expression profile
  edam:data_0937:
    text: edam:data_0937
    description: X-ray crystallography data.
    title: Electron density map
  edam:data_0938:
    text: edam:data_0938
    description: Nuclear magnetic resonance (NMR) raw data, typically for a protein.
    title: Raw NMR data
  edam:data_0939:
    text: edam:data_0939
    description: Protein secondary structure from protein coordinate or circular dichroism
      (CD) spectroscopic data.
    title: CD spectra
  edam:data_0940:
    text: edam:data_0940
    description: Volume map data from electron microscopy.
    title: Volume map
  edam:data_0942:
    text: edam:data_0942
    description: Two-dimensional gel electrophoresis image.
    title: 2D PAGE image
  edam:data_0943:
    text: edam:data_0943
    description: Spectra from mass spectrometry.
    title: Mass spectrum
  edam:data_0944:
    text: edam:data_0944
    description: 'A molecular weight standard fingerprint is standard protonated molecular
      masses e.g. from trypsin (modified porcine trypsin, Promega) and keratin peptides.

      A set of peptide masses (peptide mass fingerprint) from mass spectrometry.'
    title: Peptide mass fingerprint
  edam:data_0945:
    text: edam:data_0945
    description: Protein or peptide identifications with evidence supporting the identifications,
      for example from comparing a peptide mass fingerprint (from mass spectrometry)
      to a sequence database, or the set of typical spectra one obtains when running
      a protein through a mass spectrometer.
    title: Peptide identification
  edam:data_0949:
    text: edam:data_0949
    description: Basic information, annotation or documentation concerning a workflow
      (but not the workflow itself).
    title: Workflow metadata
  edam:data_0950:
    text: edam:data_0950
    description: A biological model represented in mathematical terms.
    title: Mathematical model
  edam:data_0951:
    text: edam:data_0951
    description: A value representing estimated statistical significance of some observed
      data; typically sequence database hits.
    title: Statistical estimate score
  edam:data_0954:
    text: edam:data_0954
    description: 'A mapping of the accession numbers (or other database identifier)
      of entries between (typically) two biological or biomedical databases.

      The cross-mapping is typically a table where each row is an accession number
      and each column is a database being cross-referenced. The cells give the accession
      number or identifier of the corresponding entry in a database. If a cell in
      the table is not filled then no mapping could be found for the database. Additional
      information might be given on version, date etc.'
    title: Database cross-mapping
  edam:data_0955:
    text: edam:data_0955
    description: An index of data of biological relevance.
    title: Data index
  edam:data_0956:
    text: edam:data_0956
    description: A human-readable collection of information concerning an analysis
      of an index of biological data.
    title: Data index report
  edam:data_0957:
    text: edam:data_0957
    description: Basic information on bioinformatics database(s) or other data sources
      such as name, type, description, URL etc.
    title: Database metadata
  edam:data_0958:
    text: edam:data_0958
    description: Basic information about one or more bioinformatics applications or
      packages, such as name, type, description, or other documentation.
    title: Tool metadata
  edam:data_0960:
    text: edam:data_0960
    description: Textual metadata on a software author or end-user, for example a
      person or other software.
    title: User metadata
  edam:data_0962:
    text: edam:data_0962
    description: A human-readable collection of information about a specific chemical
      compound.
    title: Small molecule report
  edam:data_0963:
    text: edam:data_0963
    description: A human-readable collection of information about a particular strain
      of organism cell line including plants, virus, fungi and bacteria. The data
      typically includes strain number, organism type, growth conditions, source and
      so on.
    title: Cell line report
  edam:data_0966:
    text: edam:data_0966
    description: A term (name) from an ontology.
    title: Ontology term
  edam:data_0967:
    text: edam:data_0967
    description: Data concerning or derived from a concept from a biological ontology.
    title: Ontology concept data
  edam:data_0968:
    text: edam:data_0968
    description: 'Boolean operators (AND, OR and NOT) and wildcard characters may
      be allowed.

      Keyword(s) or phrase(s) used (typically) for text-searching purposes.'
    title: Keyword
  edam:data_0970:
    text: edam:data_0970
    description: 'A bibliographic reference might include information such as authors,
      title, journal name, date and (possibly) a link to the abstract or full-text
      of the article if available.

      Bibliographic data that uniquely identifies a scientific article, book or other
      published material.'
    title: Citation
  edam:data_0971:
    text: edam:data_0971
    description: A scientific text, typically a full text article from a scientific
      journal.
    title: Article
  edam:data_0972:
    text: edam:data_0972
    description: 'A human-readable collection of information resulting from text mining.

      A text mining abstract will typically include an annotated a list of words or
      sentences extracted from one or more scientific articles.'
    title: Text mining report
  edam:data_0976:
    text: edam:data_0976
    description: 'An identifier that identifies a particular type of data.

      This concept exists only to assist EDAM maintenance and navigation in graphical
      browsers. It does not add semantic information. This branch provides an alternative
      organisation of the concepts nested under ''Accession'' and ''Name''. All concepts
      under here are already included under ''Accession'' or ''Name''.'
    title: Identifier (by type of entity)
  edam:data_0977:
    text: edam:data_0977
    description: An identifier of a bioinformatics tool, e.g. an application or web
      service.
    title: Tool identifier
  edam:data_0982:
    text: edam:data_0982
    description: Name or other identifier of a molecule.
    title: Molecule identifier
  edam:data_0983:
    text: edam:data_0983
    description: Identifier (e.g. character symbol) of a specific atom.
    title: Atom ID
  edam:data_0984:
    text: edam:data_0984
    description: Name of a specific molecule.
    title: Molecule name
  edam:data_0987:
    text: edam:data_0987
    description: Name of a chromosome.
    title: Chromosome name
  edam:data_0988:
    text: edam:data_0988
    description: Identifier of a peptide chain.
    title: Peptide identifier
  edam:data_0989:
    text: edam:data_0989
    description: Identifier of a protein.
    title: Protein identifier
  edam:data_0990:
    text: edam:data_0990
    description: Unique name of a chemical compound.
    title: Compound name
  edam:data_0991:
    text: edam:data_0991
    description: Unique registry number of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical registry number
  edam:data_0993:
    text: edam:data_0993
    description: Identifier of a drug.
    title: Drug identifier
  edam:data_0994:
    text: edam:data_0994
    description: Identifier of an amino acid.
    title: Amino acid identifier
  edam:data_0995:
    text: edam:data_0995
    description: Name or other identifier of a nucleotide.
    title: Nucleotide identifier
  edam:data_0996:
    text: edam:data_0996
    description: Identifier of a monosaccharide.
    title: Monosaccharide identifier
  edam:data_0997:
    text: edam:data_0997
    description: 'This is the recommended chemical name for use for example in database
      annotation.

      Unique name from Chemical Entities of Biological Interest (ChEBI) of a chemical
      compound.'
    title: Chemical name (ChEBI)
  edam:data_0998:
    text: edam:data_0998
    description: IUPAC recommended name of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical name (IUPAC)
  edam:data_0999:
    text: edam:data_0999
    description: International Non-proprietary Name (INN or 'generic name') of a chemical
      compound, assigned by the World Health Organisation (WHO).
    title: Chemical name (INN)
  edam:data_1000:
    text: edam:data_1000
    description: Brand name of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical name (brand)
  edam:data_1001:
    text: edam:data_1001
    description: Synonymous name of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical name (synonymous)
  edam:data_1002:
    text: edam:data_1002
    description: CAS registry number of a chemical compound; a unique numerical identifier
      of chemicals in the scientific literature, as assigned by the Chemical Abstracts
      Service.
    title: CAS number
  edam:data_1003:
    text: edam:data_1003
    description: Beilstein registry number of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical registry number (Beilstein)
  edam:data_1004:
    text: edam:data_1004
    description: Gmelin registry number of a chemical compound.
    title: Chemical registry number (Gmelin)
  edam:data_1005:
    text: edam:data_1005
    description: 3-letter code word for a ligand (HET group) from a PDB file, for
      example ATP.
    title: HET group name
  edam:data_1006:
    text: edam:data_1006
    description: String of one or more ASCII characters representing an amino acid.
    title: Amino acid name
  edam:data_1007:
    text: edam:data_1007
    description: String of one or more ASCII characters representing a nucleotide.
    title: Nucleotide code
  edam:data_1008:
    text: edam:data_1008
    description: 'Identifier of a polypeptide chain from a protein.

      This is typically a character (for the chain) appended to a PDB identifier,
      e.g. 1cukA'
    title: Polypeptide chain ID
  edam:data_1009:
    text: edam:data_1009
    description: Name of a protein.
    title: Protein name
  edam:data_1010:
    text: edam:data_1010
    description: Name or other identifier of an enzyme or record from a database of
      enzymes.
    title: Enzyme identifier
  edam:data_1011:
    text: edam:data_1011
    description: An Enzyme Commission (EC) number of an enzyme.
    title: EC number
  edam:data_1012:
    text: edam:data_1012
    description: Name of an enzyme.
    title: Enzyme name
  edam:data_1013:
    text: edam:data_1013
    description: Name of a restriction enzyme.
    title: Restriction enzyme name
  edam:data_1015:
    text: edam:data_1015
    description: A unique identifier of molecular sequence feature, for example an
      ID of a feature that is unique within the scope of the GFF file.
    title: Sequence feature ID
  edam:data_1016:
    text: edam:data_1016
    description: A position of one or more points (base or residue) in a sequence,
      or part of such a specification.
    title: Sequence position
  edam:data_1017:
    text: edam:data_1017
    description: Specification of range(s) of sequence positions.
    title: Sequence range
  edam:data_1020:
    text: edam:data_1020
    description: 'A feature key indicates the biological nature of the feature or
      information about changes to or versions of the sequence.

      The type of a sequence feature, typically a term or accession from the Sequence
      Ontology, for example an EMBL or Swiss-Prot sequence feature key.'
    title: Sequence feature key
  edam:data_1021:
    text: edam:data_1021
    description: 'Feature qualifiers hold information about a feature beyond that
      provided by the feature key and location.

      Typically one of the EMBL or Swiss-Prot feature qualifiers.'
    title: Sequence feature qualifier
  edam:data_1022:
    text: edam:data_1022
    description: 'A feature label identifies a feature of a sequence database entry.
      When used with the database name and the entry''s primary accession number,
      it is a unique identifier of that feature.

      A name of a sequence feature, e.g. the name of a feature to be displayed to
      an end-user. Typically an EMBL or Swiss-Prot feature label.'
    title: Sequence feature label
  edam:data_1023:
    text: edam:data_1023
    description: The name of a sequence feature-containing entity adhering to the
      standard feature naming scheme used by all EMBOSS applications.
    title: EMBOSS Uniform Feature Object
  edam:data_1025:
    text: edam:data_1025
    description: An identifier of a gene, such as a name/symbol or a unique identifier
      of a gene in a database.
    title: Gene identifier
  edam:data_1026:
    text: edam:data_1026
    description: The short name of a gene; a single word that does not contain white
      space characters. It is typically derived from the gene name.
    title: Gene symbol
  edam:data_1027:
    text: edam:data_1027
    description: An NCBI unique identifier of a gene.
    title: Gene ID (NCBI)
  edam:data_1031:
    text: edam:data_1031
    description: Identifier of a gene or feature from the CGD database.
    title: Gene ID (CGD)
  edam:data_1032:
    text: edam:data_1032
    description: Identifier of a gene from DictyBase.
    title: Gene ID (DictyBase)
  edam:data_1033:
    text: edam:data_1033
    description: Unique identifier for a gene (or other feature) from the Ensembl
      database.
    title: Ensembl gene ID
  edam:data_1034:
    text: edam:data_1034
    description: Identifier of an entry from the SGD database.
    title: Gene ID (SGD)
  edam:data_1035:
    text: edam:data_1035
    description: Identifier of a gene from the GeneDB database.
    title: Gene ID (GeneDB)
  edam:data_1036:
    text: edam:data_1036
    description: Identifier of an entry from the TIGR database.
    title: TIGR identifier
  edam:data_1037:
    text: edam:data_1037
    description: Identifier of an gene from the TAIR database.
    title: TAIR accession (gene)
  edam:data_1038:
    text: edam:data_1038
    description: 'Identifier of a protein structural domain.

      This is typically a character or string concatenated with a PDB identifier and
      a chain identifier.'
    title: Protein domain ID
  edam:data_1039:
    text: edam:data_1039
    description: Identifier of a protein domain (or other node) from the SCOP database.
    title: SCOP domain identifier
  edam:data_1040:
    text: edam:data_1040
    description: Identifier of a protein domain from CATH.
    title: CATH domain ID
  edam:data_1041:
    text: edam:data_1041
    description: 'A SCOP concise classification string (sccs) is a compact representation
      of a SCOP domain classification.

      An scss includes the class (alphabetical), fold, superfamily and family (all
      numerical) to which a given domain belongs.'
    title: SCOP concise classification string (sccs)
  edam:data_1042:
    text: edam:data_1042
    description: 'A sunid uniquely identifies an entry in the SCOP hierarchy, including
      leaves (the SCOP domains) and higher level nodes including entries corresponding
      to the protein level.

      Unique identifier (number) of an entry in the SCOP hierarchy, for example 33229.'
    title: SCOP sunid
  edam:data_1043:
    text: edam:data_1043
    description: A code number identifying a node from the CATH database.
    title: CATH node ID
  edam:data_1044:
    text: edam:data_1044
    description: The name of a biological kingdom (Bacteria, Archaea, or Eukaryotes).
    title: Kingdom name
  edam:data_1045:
    text: edam:data_1045
    description: The name of a species (typically a taxonomic group) of organism.
    title: Species name
  edam:data_1046:
    text: edam:data_1046
    description: The name of a strain of an organism variant, typically a plant, virus
      or bacterium.
    title: Strain name
  edam:data_1047:
    text: edam:data_1047
    description: A string of characters that name or otherwise identify a resource
      on the Internet.
    title: URI
  edam:data_1048:
    text: edam:data_1048
    description: An identifier of a biological or bioinformatics database.
    title: Database ID
  edam:data_1049:
    text: edam:data_1049
    description: The name of a directory.
    title: Directory name
  edam:data_1050:
    text: edam:data_1050
    description: The name (or part of a name) of a file (of any type).
    title: File name
  edam:data_1051:
    text: edam:data_1051
    description: Name of an ontology of biological or bioinformatics concepts and
      relations.
    title: Ontology name
  edam:data_1052:
    text: edam:data_1052
    description: A Uniform Resource Locator (URL).
    title: URL
  edam:data_1053:
    text: edam:data_1053
    description: A Uniform Resource Name (URN).
    title: URN
  edam:data_1055:
    text: edam:data_1055
    description: 'A Life Science Identifier (LSID) - a unique identifier of some data.

      LSIDs provide a standard way to locate and describe data. An LSID is represented
      as a Uniform Resource Name (URN) with the following format: URN:LSID:<Authority>:<Namespace>:<ObjectID>[:<Version>]'
    title: LSID
  edam:data_1056:
    text: edam:data_1056
    description: The name of a biological or bioinformatics database.
    title: Database name
  edam:data_1058:
    text: edam:data_1058
    description: The name of a file (of any type) with restricted possible values.
    title: Enumerated file name
  edam:data_1059:
    text: edam:data_1059
    description: 'A file extension is the characters appearing after the final ''.''
      in the file name.

      The extension of a file name.'
    title: File name extension
  edam:data_1060:
    text: edam:data_1060
    description: 'A file base name is the file name stripped of its directory specification
      and extension.

      The base name of a file.'
    title: File base name
  edam:data_1061:
    text: edam:data_1061
    description: Name of a QSAR descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor name
  edam:data_1063:
    text: edam:data_1063
    description: An identifier of molecular sequence(s) or entries from a molecular
      sequence database.
    title: Sequence identifier
  edam:data_1064:
    text: edam:data_1064
    description: An identifier of a set of molecular sequence(s).
    title: Sequence set ID
  edam:data_1066:
    text: edam:data_1066
    description: Identifier of a molecular sequence alignment, for example a record
      from an alignment database.
    title: Sequence alignment ID
  edam:data_1068:
    text: edam:data_1068
    description: Identifier of a phylogenetic tree for example from a phylogenetic
      tree database.
    title: Phylogenetic tree ID
  edam:data_1069:
    text: edam:data_1069
    description: An identifier of a comparison matrix.
    title: Comparison matrix identifier
  edam:data_1070:
    text: edam:data_1070
    description: A unique and persistent identifier of a molecular tertiary structure,
      typically an entry from a structure database.
    title: Structure ID
  edam:data_1071:
    text: edam:data_1071
    description: Identifier or name of a structural (3D) profile or template (representing
      a structure or structure alignment).
    title: Structural (3D) profile ID
  edam:data_1072:
    text: edam:data_1072
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of tertiary structure alignments.
    title: Structure alignment ID
  edam:data_1073:
    text: edam:data_1073
    description: Identifier of an index of amino acid physicochemical and biochemical
      property data.
    title: Amino acid index ID
  edam:data_1074:
    text: edam:data_1074
    description: Identifier of a report of protein interactions from a protein interaction
      database (typically).
    title: Protein interaction ID
  edam:data_1075:
    text: edam:data_1075
    description: Identifier of a protein family.
    title: Protein family identifier
  edam:data_1076:
    text: edam:data_1076
    description: Unique name of a codon usage table.
    title: Codon usage table name
  edam:data_1077:
    text: edam:data_1077
    description: Identifier of a transcription factor (or a TF binding site).
    title: Transcription factor identifier
  edam:data_1078:
    text: edam:data_1078
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of microarray data.
    title: Experiment annotation ID
  edam:data_1079:
    text: edam:data_1079
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of electron microscopy data.
    title: Electron microscopy model ID
  edam:data_1080:
    text: edam:data_1080
    description: Accession of a report of gene expression (e.g. a gene expression
      profile) from a database.
    title: Gene expression report ID
  edam:data_1081:
    text: edam:data_1081
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of genotypes and phenotypes.
    title: Genotype and phenotype annotation ID
  edam:data_1082:
    text: edam:data_1082
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of biological pathways or
      networks.
    title: Pathway or network identifier
  edam:data_1083:
    text: edam:data_1083
    description: Identifier of a biological or biomedical workflow, typically from
      a database of workflows.
    title: Workflow ID
  edam:data_1084:
    text: edam:data_1084
    description: Identifier of a data type definition from some provider.
    title: Data resource definition ID
  edam:data_1085:
    text: edam:data_1085
    description: Identifier of a mathematical model, typically an entry from a database.
    title: Biological model ID
  edam:data_1086:
    text: edam:data_1086
    description: Identifier of an entry from a database of chemicals.
    title: Compound identifier
  edam:data_1087:
    text: edam:data_1087
    description: A unique (typically numerical) identifier of a concept in an ontology
      of biological or bioinformatics concepts and relations.
    title: Ontology concept ID
  edam:data_1088:
    text: edam:data_1088
    description: Unique identifier of a scientific article.
    title: Article ID
  edam:data_1089:
    text: edam:data_1089
    description: Identifier of an object from the FlyBase database.
    title: FlyBase ID
  edam:data_1091:
    text: edam:data_1091
    description: Name of an object from the WormBase database, usually a human-readable
      name.
    title: WormBase name
  edam:data_1092:
    text: edam:data_1092
    description: 'A WormBase class describes the type of object such as ''sequence''
      or ''protein''.

      Class of an object from the WormBase database.'
    title: WormBase class
  edam:data_1093:
    text: edam:data_1093
    description: A persistent, unique identifier of a molecular sequence database
      entry.
    title: Sequence accession
  edam:data_1095:
    text: edam:data_1095
    description: The name of a sequence-based entity adhering to the standard sequence
      naming scheme used by all EMBOSS applications.
    title: EMBOSS Uniform Sequence Address
  edam:data_1096:
    text: edam:data_1096
    description: Accession number of a protein sequence database entry.
    title: Sequence accession (protein)
  edam:data_1097:
    text: edam:data_1097
    description: Accession number of a nucleotide sequence database entry.
    title: Sequence accession (nucleic acid)
  edam:data_1098:
    text: edam:data_1098
    description: Accession number of a RefSeq database entry.
    title: RefSeq accession
  edam:data_1100:
    text: edam:data_1100
    description: An identifier of PIR sequence database entry.
    title: PIR identifier
  edam:data_1102:
    text: edam:data_1102
    description: Primary identifier of a Gramene database entry.
    title: Gramene primary identifier
  edam:data_1103:
    text: edam:data_1103
    description: Identifier of a (nucleic acid) entry from the EMBL/GenBank/DDBJ databases.
    title: EMBL/GenBank/DDBJ ID
  edam:data_1104:
    text: edam:data_1104
    description: A unique identifier of an entry (gene cluster) from the NCBI UniGene
      database.
    title: Sequence cluster ID (UniGene)
  edam:data_1105:
    text: edam:data_1105
    description: Identifier of a dbEST database entry.
    title: dbEST accession
  edam:data_1106:
    text: edam:data_1106
    description: Identifier of a dbSNP database entry.
    title: dbSNP ID
  edam:data_1112:
    text: edam:data_1112
    description: An identifier of a cluster of molecular sequence(s).
    title: Sequence cluster ID
  edam:data_1113:
    text: edam:data_1113
    description: Unique identifier of an entry from the COG database.
    title: Sequence cluster ID (COG)
  edam:data_1114:
    text: edam:data_1114
    description: Identifier of a sequence motif, for example an entry from a motif
      database.
    title: Sequence motif identifier
  edam:data_1115:
    text: edam:data_1115
    description: 'A sequence profile typically represents a sequence alignment.

      Identifier of a sequence profile.'
    title: Sequence profile ID
  edam:data_1116:
    text: edam:data_1116
    description: Identifier of an entry from the ELMdb database of protein functional
      sites.
    title: ELM ID
  edam:data_1117:
    text: edam:data_1117
    description: Accession number of an entry from the Prosite database.
    title: Prosite accession number
  edam:data_1118:
    text: edam:data_1118
    description: Unique identifier or name of a HMMER hidden Markov model.
    title: HMMER hidden Markov model ID
  edam:data_1119:
    text: edam:data_1119
    description: Unique identifier or name of a profile from the JASPAR database.
    title: JASPAR profile ID
  edam:data_1123:
    text: edam:data_1123
    description: Accession number of an entry from the TreeBASE database.
    title: TreeBASE study accession number
  edam:data_1124:
    text: edam:data_1124
    description: Accession number of an entry from the TreeFam database.
    title: TreeFam accession number
  edam:data_1126:
    text: edam:data_1126
    description: 'See for example http://www.ebi.ac.uk/Tools/webservices/help/matrix.

      Unique name or identifier of a comparison matrix.'
    title: Comparison matrix name
  edam:data_1127:
    text: edam:data_1127
    description: 'A PDB identification code which consists of 4 characters, the first
      of which is a digit in the range 0 - 9; the remaining 3 are alphanumeric, and
      letters are upper case only. (source: https://cdn.rcsb.org/wwpdb/docs/documentation/file-format/PDB_format_1996.pdf)

      An identifier of an entry from the PDB database.'
    title: PDB ID
  edam:data_1128:
    text: edam:data_1128
    description: Identifier of an entry from the AAindex database.
    title: AAindex ID
  edam:data_1129:
    text: edam:data_1129
    description: Accession number of an entry from the BIND database.
    title: BIND accession number
  edam:data_1130:
    text: edam:data_1130
    description: Accession number of an entry from the IntAct database.
    title: IntAct accession number
  edam:data_1131:
    text: edam:data_1131
    description: Name of a protein family.
    title: Protein family name
  edam:data_1132:
    text: edam:data_1132
    description: Name of an InterPro entry, usually indicating the type of protein
      matches for that entry.
    title: InterPro entry name
  edam:data_1133:
    text: edam:data_1133
    description: 'Every InterPro entry has a unique accession number to provide a
      persistent citation of database records.

      Primary accession number of an InterPro entry.'
    title: InterPro accession
  edam:data_1134:
    text: edam:data_1134
    description: Secondary accession number of an InterPro entry.
    title: InterPro secondary accession
  edam:data_1135:
    text: edam:data_1135
    description: Unique identifier of an entry from the Gene3D database.
    title: Gene3D ID
  edam:data_1136:
    text: edam:data_1136
    description: Unique identifier of an entry from the PIRSF database.
    title: PIRSF ID
  edam:data_1137:
    text: edam:data_1137
    description: The unique identifier of an entry in the PRINTS database.
    title: PRINTS code
  edam:data_1138:
    text: edam:data_1138
    description: Accession number of a Pfam entry.
    title: Pfam accession number
  edam:data_1139:
    text: edam:data_1139
    description: Accession number of an entry from the SMART database.
    title: SMART accession number
  edam:data_1140:
    text: edam:data_1140
    description: Unique identifier (number) of a hidden Markov model from the Superfamily
      database.
    title: Superfamily hidden Markov model number
  edam:data_1141:
    text: edam:data_1141
    description: Accession number of an entry (family) from the TIGRFam database.
    title: TIGRFam ID
  edam:data_1142:
    text: edam:data_1142
    description: 'A ProDom domain family accession number.

      ProDom is a protein domain family database.'
    title: ProDom accession number
  edam:data_1143:
    text: edam:data_1143
    description: Identifier of an entry from the TRANSFAC database.
    title: TRANSFAC accession number
  edam:data_1144:
    text: edam:data_1144
    description: Accession number of an entry from the ArrayExpress database.
    title: ArrayExpress accession number
  edam:data_1145:
    text: edam:data_1145
    description: PRIDE experiment accession number.
    title: PRIDE experiment accession number
  edam:data_1146:
    text: edam:data_1146
    description: Identifier of an entry from the EMDB electron microscopy database.
    title: EMDB ID
  edam:data_1147:
    text: edam:data_1147
    description: Accession number of an entry from the GEO database.
    title: GEO accession number
  edam:data_1148:
    text: edam:data_1148
    description: Identifier of an entry from the GermOnline database.
    title: GermOnline ID
  edam:data_1149:
    text: edam:data_1149
    description: Identifier of an entry from the EMAGE database.
    title: EMAGE ID
  edam:data_1150:
    text: edam:data_1150
    description: Accession number of an entry from a database of disease.
    title: Disease ID
  edam:data_1151:
    text: edam:data_1151
    description: Identifier of an entry from the HGVbase database.
    title: HGVbase ID
  edam:data_1153:
    text: edam:data_1153
    description: Identifier of an entry from the OMIM database.
    title: OMIM ID
  edam:data_1154:
    text: edam:data_1154
    description: Unique identifier of an object from one of the KEGG databases (excluding
      the GENES division).
    title: KEGG object identifier
  edam:data_1155:
    text: edam:data_1155
    description: Identifier of an entry from the Reactome database.
    title: Pathway ID (reactome)
  edam:data_1157:
    text: edam:data_1157
    description: Identifier of an pathway from the BioCyc biological pathways database.
    title: Pathway ID (BioCyc)
  edam:data_1158:
    text: edam:data_1158
    description: Identifier of an entry from the INOH database.
    title: Pathway ID (INOH)
  edam:data_1159:
    text: edam:data_1159
    description: Identifier of an entry from the PATIKA database.
    title: Pathway ID (PATIKA)
  edam:data_1160:
    text: edam:data_1160
    description: 'Identifier of an entry from the CPDB (ConsensusPathDB) biological
      pathways database, which is an identifier from an external database integrated
      into CPDB.

      This concept refers to identifiers used by the databases collated in CPDB; CPDB
      identifiers are not independently defined.'
    title: Pathway ID (CPDB)
  edam:data_1161:
    text: edam:data_1161
    description: Identifier of a biological pathway from the Panther Pathways database.
    title: Pathway ID (Panther)
  edam:data_1162:
    text: edam:data_1162
    description: 'This is the identifier used internally by MIRIAM for a data type.

      Unique identifier of a MIRIAM data resource.'
    title: MIRIAM identifier
  edam:data_1163:
    text: edam:data_1163
    description: The name of a data type from the MIRIAM database.
    title: MIRIAM data type name
  edam:data_1164:
    text: edam:data_1164
    description: 'A MIRIAM URI consists of the URI of the MIRIAM data type (PubMed,
      UniProt etc) followed by the identifier of an element of that data type, for
      example PMID for a publication or an accession number for a GO term.

      The URI (URL or URN) of a data entity from the MIRIAM database.'
    title: MIRIAM URI
  edam:data_1165:
    text: edam:data_1165
    description: 'The primary name of a MIRIAM data type is taken from a controlled
      vocabulary.

      The primary name of a data type from the MIRIAM database.'
    title: MIRIAM data type primary name
  edam:data_1166:
    text: edam:data_1166
    description: 'A synonymous name for a MIRIAM data type taken from a controlled
      vocabulary.

      A synonymous name of a data type from the MIRIAM database.'
    title: MIRIAM data type synonymous name
  edam:data_1167:
    text: edam:data_1167
    description: Unique identifier of a Taverna workflow.
    title: Taverna workflow ID
  edam:data_1170:
    text: edam:data_1170
    description: Name of a biological (mathematical) model.
    title: Biological model name
  edam:data_1171:
    text: edam:data_1171
    description: Unique identifier of an entry from the BioModel database.
    title: BioModel ID
  edam:data_1172:
    text: edam:data_1172
    description: Chemical structure specified in PubChem Compound Identification (CID),
      a non-zero integer identifier for a unique chemical structure.
    title: PubChem CID
  edam:data_1173:
    text: edam:data_1173
    description: Identifier of an entry from the ChemSpider database.
    title: ChemSpider ID
  edam:data_1174:
    text: edam:data_1174
    description: Identifier of an entry from the ChEBI database.
    title: ChEBI ID
  edam:data_1175:
    text: edam:data_1175
    description: An identifier of a concept from the BioPax ontology.
    title: BioPax concept ID
  edam:data_1176:
    text: edam:data_1176
    description: An identifier of a concept from The Gene Ontology.
    title: GO concept ID
  edam:data_1177:
    text: edam:data_1177
    description: An identifier of a concept from the MeSH vocabulary.
    title: MeSH concept ID
  edam:data_1178:
    text: edam:data_1178
    description: An identifier of a concept from the HGNC controlled vocabulary.
    title: HGNC concept ID
  edam:data_1179:
    text: edam:data_1179
    description: A stable unique identifier for each taxon (for a species, a family,
      an order, or any other group in the NCBI taxonomy database.
    title: NCBI taxonomy ID
  edam:data_1180:
    text: edam:data_1180
    description: An identifier of a concept from the Plant Ontology (PO).
    title: Plant Ontology concept ID
  edam:data_1181:
    text: edam:data_1181
    description: An identifier of a concept from the UMLS vocabulary.
    title: UMLS concept ID
  edam:data_1182:
    text: edam:data_1182
    description: 'An identifier of a concept from Foundational Model of Anatomy.

      Classifies anatomical entities according to their shared characteristics (genus)
      and distinguishing characteristics (differentia). Specifies the part-whole and
      spatial relationships of the entities, morphological transformation of the entities
      during prenatal development and the postnatal life cycle and principles, rules
      and definitions according to which classes and relationships in the other three
      components of FMA are represented.'
    title: FMA concept ID
  edam:data_1183:
    text: edam:data_1183
    description: An identifier of a concept from the EMAP mouse ontology.
    title: EMAP concept ID
  edam:data_1184:
    text: edam:data_1184
    description: An identifier of a concept from the ChEBI ontology.
    title: ChEBI concept ID
  edam:data_1185:
    text: edam:data_1185
    description: An identifier of a concept from the MGED ontology.
    title: MGED concept ID
  edam:data_1186:
    text: edam:data_1186
    description: 'An identifier of a concept from the myGrid ontology.

      The ontology is provided as two components, the service ontology and the domain
      ontology. The domain ontology acts provides concepts for core bioinformatics
      data types and their relations. The service ontology describes the physical
      and operational features of web services.'
    title: myGrid concept ID
  edam:data_1187:
    text: edam:data_1187
    description: PubMed unique identifier of an article.
    title: PubMed ID
  edam:data_1188:
    text: edam:data_1188
    description: Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of a published article.
    title: DOI
  edam:data_1189:
    text: edam:data_1189
    description: 'Medline UI (unique identifier) of an article.

      The use of Medline UI has been replaced by the PubMed unique identifier.'
    title: Medline UI
  edam:data_1190:
    text: edam:data_1190
    description: The name of a computer package, application, method or function.
    title: Tool name
  edam:data_1191:
    text: edam:data_1191
    description: 'Signature methods from http://www.ebi.ac.uk/Tools/InterProScan/help.html#results
      include BlastProDom, FPrintScan, HMMPIR, HMMPfam, HMMSmart, HMMTigr, ProfileScan,
      ScanRegExp, SuperFamily and HAMAP.

      The unique name of a signature (sequence classifier) method.'
    title: Tool name (signature)
  edam:data_1192:
    text: edam:data_1192
    description: 'The name of a BLAST tool.

      This include ''blastn'', ''blastp'', ''blastx'', ''tblastn'' and ''tblastx''.'
    title: Tool name (BLAST)
  edam:data_1193:
    text: edam:data_1193
    description: 'The name of a FASTA tool.

      This includes ''fasta3'', ''fastx3'', ''fasty3'', ''fastf3'', ''fasts3'' and
      ''ssearch''.'
    title: Tool name (FASTA)
  edam:data_1194:
    text: edam:data_1194
    description: The name of an EMBOSS application.
    title: Tool name (EMBOSS)
  edam:data_1195:
    text: edam:data_1195
    description: The name of an EMBASSY package.
    title: Tool name (EMBASSY package)
  edam:data_1201:
    text: edam:data_1201
    description: A QSAR constitutional descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor (constitutional)
  edam:data_1202:
    text: edam:data_1202
    description: A QSAR electronic descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor (electronic)
  edam:data_1203:
    text: edam:data_1203
    description: A QSAR geometrical descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor (geometrical)
  edam:data_1204:
    text: edam:data_1204
    description: A QSAR topological descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor (topological)
  edam:data_1205:
    text: edam:data_1205
    description: A QSAR molecular descriptor.
    title: QSAR descriptor (molecular)
  edam:data_1233:
    text: edam:data_1233
    description: Any collection of multiple protein sequences and associated metadata
      that do not (typically) correspond to common sequence database records or database
      entries.
    title: Sequence set (protein)
  edam:data_1234:
    text: edam:data_1234
    description: Any collection of multiple nucleotide sequences and associated metadata
      that do not (typically) correspond to common sequence database records or database
      entries.
    title: Sequence set (nucleic acid)
  edam:data_1235:
    text: edam:data_1235
    description: 'A set of sequences that have been clustered or otherwise classified
      as belonging to a group including (typically) sequence cluster information.

      The cluster might include sequences identifiers, short descriptions, alignment
      and summary information.'
    title: Sequence cluster
  edam:data_1238:
    text: edam:data_1238
    description: A protein sequence cleaved into peptide fragments (by enzymatic or
      chemical cleavage) with fragment masses.
    title: Proteolytic digest
  edam:data_1239:
    text: edam:data_1239
    description: Restriction digest fragments from digesting a nucleotide sequence
      with restriction sites using a restriction endonuclease.
    title: Restriction digest
  edam:data_1240:
    text: edam:data_1240
    description: Oligonucleotide primer(s) for PCR and DNA amplification, for example
      a minimal primer set.
    title: PCR primers
  edam:data_1245:
    text: edam:data_1245
    description: 'A cluster of protein sequences.

      The sequences are typically related, for example a family of sequences.'
    title: Sequence cluster (protein)
  edam:data_1246:
    text: edam:data_1246
    description: 'A cluster of nucleotide sequences.

      The sequences are typically related, for example a family of sequences.'
    title: Sequence cluster (nucleic acid)
  edam:data_1249:
    text: edam:data_1249
    description: The size (length) of a sequence, subsequence or region in a sequence,
      or range(s) of lengths.
    title: Sequence length
  edam:data_1254:
    text: edam:data_1254
    description: An informative report about non-positional sequence features, typically
      a report on general molecular sequence properties derived from sequence analysis.
    title: Sequence property
  edam:data_1255:
    text: edam:data_1255
    description: 'Annotation of positional features of molecular sequence(s), i.e.
      that can be mapped to position(s) in the sequence.

      This includes annotation of positional sequence features, organised into a standard
      feature table, or any other report of sequence features. General feature reports
      are a source of sequence feature table information although internal conversion
      would be required.'
    title: Sequence features
  edam:data_1259:
    text: edam:data_1259
    description: A report on sequence complexity, for example low-complexity or repeat
      regions in sequences.
    title: Sequence complexity report
  edam:data_1260:
    text: edam:data_1260
    description: A report on ambiguity in molecular sequence(s).
    title: Sequence ambiguity report
  edam:data_1261:
    text: edam:data_1261
    description: A report (typically a table) on character or word composition / frequency
      of a molecular sequence(s).
    title: Sequence composition report
  edam:data_1262:
    text: edam:data_1262
    description: A report on peptide fragments of certain molecular weight(s) in one
      or more protein sequences.
    title: Peptide molecular weight hits
  edam:data_1263:
    text: edam:data_1263
    description: A plot of third base position variability in a nucleotide sequence.
    title: Base position variability plot
  edam:data_1265:
    text: edam:data_1265
    description: A table of base frequencies of a nucleotide sequence.
    title: Base frequencies table
  edam:data_1266:
    text: edam:data_1266
    description: A table of word composition of a nucleotide sequence.
    title: Base word frequencies table
  edam:data_1267:
    text: edam:data_1267
    description: A table of amino acid frequencies of a protein sequence.
    title: Amino acid frequencies table
  edam:data_1268:
    text: edam:data_1268
    description: A table of amino acid word composition of a protein sequence.
    title: Amino acid word frequencies table
  edam:data_1270:
    text: edam:data_1270
    description: Annotation of positional sequence features, organised into a standard
      feature table.
    title: Feature table
  edam:data_1274:
    text: edam:data_1274
    description: A map of (typically one) DNA sequence annotated with positional or
      non-positional features.
    title: Map
  edam:data_1276:
    text: edam:data_1276
    description: 'An informative report on intrinsic positional features of a nucleotide
      sequence, formatted to be machine-readable.

      This includes nucleotide sequence feature annotation in any known sequence feature
      table format and any other report of nucleic acid features.'
    title: Nucleic acid features
  edam:data_1277:
    text: edam:data_1277
    description: 'An informative report on intrinsic positional features of a protein
      sequence.

      This includes protein sequence feature annotation in any known sequence feature
      table format and any other report of protein features.'
    title: Protein features
  edam:data_1278:
    text: edam:data_1278
    description: 'A genetic (linkage) map indicates the proximity of two genes on
      a chromosome, whether two genes are linked and the frequency they are transmitted
      together to an offspring. They are limited to genetic markers of traits observable
      only in whole organisms.

      A map showing the relative positions of genetic markers in a nucleic acid sequence,
      based on estimation of non-physical distance such as recombination frequencies.'
    title: Genetic map
  edam:data_1279:
    text: edam:data_1279
    description: 'A map of genetic markers in a contiguous, assembled genomic sequence,
      with the sizes and separation of markers measured in base pairs.

      A sequence map typically includes annotation on significant subsequences such
      as contigs, haplotypes and genes. The contigs shown will (typically) be a set
      of small overlapping clones representing a complete chromosomal segment.'
    title: Sequence map
  edam:data_1280:
    text: edam:data_1280
    description: 'A map of DNA (linear or circular) annotated with physical features
      or landmarks such as restriction sites, cloned DNA fragments, genes or genetic
      markers, along with the physical distances between them.

      Distance in a physical map is measured in base pairs. A physical map might be
      ordered relative to a reference map (typically a genetic map) in the process
      of genome sequencing.'
    title: Physical map
  edam:data_1283:
    text: edam:data_1283
    description: 'A map showing banding patterns derived from direct observation of
      a stained chromosome.

      This is the lowest-resolution physical map and can provide only rough estimates
      of physical (base pair) distances. Like a genetic map, they are limited to genetic
      markers of traits observable only in whole organisms.'
    title: Cytogenetic map
  edam:data_1284:
    text: edam:data_1284
    description: A gene map showing distances between loci based on relative cotransduction
      frequencies.
    title: DNA transduction map
  edam:data_1285:
    text: edam:data_1285
    description: Sequence map of a single gene annotated with genetic features such
      as introns, exons, untranslated regions, polyA signals, promoters, enhancers
      and (possibly) mutations defining alleles of a gene.
    title: Gene map
  edam:data_1286:
    text: edam:data_1286
    description: Sequence map of a plasmid (circular DNA).
    title: Plasmid map
  edam:data_1288:
    text: edam:data_1288
    description: Sequence map of a whole genome.
    title: Genome map
  edam:data_1289:
    text: edam:data_1289
    description: Image of the restriction enzyme cleavage sites (restriction sites)
      in a nucleic acid sequence.
    title: Restriction map
  edam:data_1347:
    text: edam:data_1347
    description: Dirichlet distribution used by hidden Markov model analysis programs.
    title: Dirichlet distribution
  edam:data_1352:
    text: edam:data_1352
    description: Regular expression pattern.
    title: Regular expression
  edam:data_1353:
    text: edam:data_1353
    description: Any specific or conserved pattern (typically expressed as a regular
      expression) in a molecular sequence.
    title: Sequence motif
  edam:data_1354:
    text: edam:data_1354
    description: Some type of statistical model representing a (typically multiple)
      sequence alignment.
    title: Sequence profile
  edam:data_1355:
    text: edam:data_1355
    description: An informative report about a specific or conserved protein sequence
      pattern.
    title: Protein signature
  edam:data_1361:
    text: edam:data_1361
    description: A profile (typically representing a sequence alignment) that is a
      simple matrix of nucleotide (or amino acid) counts per position.
    title: Position frequency matrix
  edam:data_1362:
    text: edam:data_1362
    description: 'A profile (typically representing a sequence alignment) that is
      weighted matrix of nucleotide (or amino acid) counts per position.

      Contributions of individual sequences to the matrix might be uneven (weighted).'
    title: Position weight matrix
  edam:data_1363:
    text: edam:data_1363
    description: A profile (typically representing a sequence alignment) derived from
      a matrix of nucleotide (or amino acid) counts per position that reflects information
      content at each position.
    title: Information content matrix
  edam:data_1364:
    text: edam:data_1364
    description: A statistical Markov model of a system which is assumed to be a Markov
      process with unobserved (hidden) states. For example, a hidden Markov model
      representation of a set or alignment of sequences.
    title: Hidden Markov model
  edam:data_1365:
    text: edam:data_1365
    description: One or more fingerprints (sequence classifiers) as used in the PRINTS
      database.
    title: Fingerprint
  edam:data_1381:
    text: edam:data_1381
    description: Alignment of exactly two molecular sequences.
    title: Pair sequence alignment
  edam:data_1383:
    text: edam:data_1383
    description: Alignment of multiple nucleotide sequences.
    title: Nucleic acid sequence alignment
  edam:data_1384:
    text: edam:data_1384
    description: Alignment of multiple protein sequences.
    title: Protein sequence alignment
  edam:data_1385:
    text: edam:data_1385
    description: 'Alignment of multiple molecular sequences of different types.

      Hybrid sequence alignments include for example genomic DNA to EST, cDNA or mRNA.'
    title: Hybrid sequence alignment
  edam:data_1394:
